base_checkpoint_selection: highest unweighted manifest-v2 validation macro_f1 across the frozen three-epoch schedule
calibration: single scalar temperature fit on validation cross-entropy with equal total weight per validation source and a pre-frozen minimum temperature of 1.0

fixed_thresholds.origin: historical selected product thresholds from hierarchical_product_evaluation_v2.json, fixed before v5 or v6 existed

expected_crop_source_in_product: trusted crop-cycle metadata supplied by the API request
evaluation_expected_crop_for_ood_rows: deterministic balanced simulation: sha256('expected:' + image_id) modulo maize,paddy,potato,wheat
decision: temperature-scale logits using validation only without sharpening below temperature 1.0
return U when predicted crop differs from expected crop and its aggregate score is at least 0.9
otherwise restrict health decision to expected-crop healthy/disease plus invalid
selection: No v6 threshold fitting. Reuse the pre-v5 product thresholds exactly.
test_disclosure: The immutable test was observed for earlier candidates. V6 uses a preservation recipe and the historical product thresholds; no v6 test logit or metric was available when this contract was frozen.
